title: Smooth Third Person Camera
description: Lightweight client mod that smooths third-person camera movement.
body:
# Smooth Third Person Camera

## Features
- Smooth camera follow in third-person view
- Configurable `smoothness` and `maxDistance`
- Optional `Limit Break` mode for direct numeric input
- ModMenu integration for in-game configuration (Fabric build)

## Preview

Smooth camera enabled (third-person).  
*Example settings: smoothness=0.14, maxDistance=50.0*  
> Note: These are **not** the default values. Default is **smoothness=0.30** and **maxDistance=20.0**.
>
> Note: This preview is captured on the **Fabric** build.

![Smooth camera Full-screen Preview](https://yoima.com/mc/smooththirdpersoncamera/gallery/a-1.gif)

## Comparison (Vanilla vs Smooth camera)

**Left:** Vanilla (no mod)  
**Right:** Smooth camera enabled

> Note: Comparison GIFs are from the **Fabric** build.

| Scenario | Vanilla | Smooth camera |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Elytra flight | ![Vanilla sprint turns](https://yoima.com/mc/smooththirdpersoncamera/gallery/2-1.gif) | ![Smooth camera sprint turns](https://yoima.com/mc/smooththirdpersoncamera/gallery/1-1.gif) |
